svg.text: Bounded probe at the jjreadnp/ephemeris-state bridge, not a physical delta_SEP implementation.
rebuild: jjreadnp.o + smu_probe_adjust_states.o + llr_npt_crd relink only
no batch-script edits, no PLEPH edits, no jeulpkg.f surgery
probe: +/- 0.01 m Moon displacement along instantaneous Earth->Moon line
-0.010m: mean Δ93 = 0.066715 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, frfin diffs = 12, frd exact = True, npt ΔTOF = 0.000e+00 s, npt ΔPmM = 66.700 ps
+0.010m: mean Δ93 = -0.066719 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, frfin diffs = 12, frd exact = True, npt ΔTOF = 0.000e+00 s, npt ΔPmM = -66.700 ps
The prediction/state insertion does not spill into broad surgery at the software-interface level.
The gate remains bounded to the ephemeris-state bridge, but this is still not a physical weak-field fit.
If a real delta_SEP model later demands editing PLEPH or regenerating ephemerides, stop and hand off outward.
